summary: Provisioned the Xinsir ControlNet Union SDXL model locally, copied the QA-reviewed BAE normal map into active ComfyUI input, created/exported the normal lane with SetUnionControlNetType=normal, built a local run package, executed one bounded local ComfyUI generation with LowVram, pulled back diagnostic and generated portrait artifacts, and completed technical plus strict whole-image visual QA.
qa_notes: No visible rainbow normal-map leakage in the generated portrait.
Face planes, eyes, hair, neck, collar, and clothing geometry are coherent for the local smoke sample.
Slight beauty-polished skin and soft shirt texture remain.
Hands, full-body anatomy, multisample robustness, and target-runtime EC2 proof remain unproven.
next_action: Depth, lineart, OpenPose, and normal now have local smoke coverage with notes. Continue with targeted robustness/certification sampling or intentionally selected target-runtime proof.
